description: Style Note Ethnic clutch for that fancy do you've been planning. Silk upper with snazzy embellishments, match the metallic tones on the clutch with your jewellery for the day. Product Details Brown synthetic upper A beaded flap with magnetic button closure securing the clutch Magnetic closure (fabric inner) A zippered pocket inside the main compartment Material and Care Synthetic Wipe with a clean cloth to remove dust Size Dimensions: 26 cm x 13 cm
